task_completion.description: Load the reference countries shapefile into the GIS application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'ne_110m_admin_0_countries' in the layer list (Table of Contents) and a map displaying world countries.

task_completion.description: Create a new polygon shapefile for the Iceland boundary.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'New Layer' or 'Export' dialog specifying the path '/home/ga/gvsig_data/projects/iceland_boundary.shp' with Polygon geometry, or 'iceland_boundary' appearing as a new layer in the layer list.

task_completion.description: Define a new string field named 'region_id' with length 20.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a field definition, table schema, or layer properties dialog showing a field named 'region_id' set to String/Text type with a length of 20.

task_completion.description: Digitize a polygon boundary enclosing the island of Iceland.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the map view zoomed in on Iceland (an island in the North Atlantic) with a newly drawn polygon covering the island. Editing tools, vertices, or a highlighted new feature should be visible.

task_completion.description: Set the attribute value of the new polygon to 'ISL-Zone-01'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the attribute table or feature properties dialog for the 'iceland_boundary' layer showing the value 'ISL-Zone-01' entered in the 'region_id' column.

integrity.description: The agent used the GIS graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the GIS application (e.g., gvSIG) menus, toolbars, and dialogs, rather than just terminal commands executing GDAL/OGR scripts.

integrity.description: The agent manually digitized the boundary or used GUI tools to extract it, rather than running a background script.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for active editing sessions, drawing tools being selected, or the attribute table being manually edited in the GUI.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the GUI by writing a Python/bash script in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure that a text editor (like nano, vim, or gedit) is not the primary tool used to generate the shapefile.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The reference shapefile is '/home/ga/gvsig_data/countries/ne_110m_admin_0_countries.shp'. The output shapefile must be saved to '/home/ga/gvsig_data/projects/iceland_boundary.shp'. The new shapefile must contain a polygon that covers at least 80% of Iceland (country code 'ISL'). The shapefile must have a field named 'region_id' containing the exact value 'ISL-Zone-01'.
